name: screenlink
description: Virtual Extended Monitor - Seamless Screen Sharing

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:portable: npm run build && npm run tauri:build
scripts.lint: echo 'Linting in subprojects...' && cd backend && npm run lint --if-present && cd ../frontend && npm run lint --if-present
scripts.lint:fix: echo 'Fixing lint in subprojects...' && cd backend && npm run lint:fix --if-present && cd ../frontend && npm run lint:fix --if-present
scripts.type-check: echo 'Type checking in subprojects...' && cd backend && npm run type-check --if-present && cd ../frontend && npm run type-check --if-present

author: ScreenLink Contributors
